_comment: IT/Network-focused profile. Feed this to the LLM for Network & Systems Engineer applications.
profile_summary: Network & Systems Engineer with 7+ years at Semahal (Cisco, VoIP, SNMP). Recently completed a Master's in CS at Montpellier. I leverage Python and AI tools to automate infrastructure operations — monitoring, reporting, and incident detection.

highlights: Managed network and VoIP infrastructure for 1,500+ users — incident resolution, SLA compliance, 24/7 on-call
Built Python/SNMP automation scripts to manage 70 Cisco 2960 switches remotely, eliminating 70% of on-site interventions
Deployed SolarWinds dashboards for proactive monitoring — detected 30% of incidents before user reports
Wrote Bash scripts reducing diagnostic time by 40%; automated reporting pipelines via Python
Built AI-powered data extraction pipelines (PDF, Excel) using LLMs and vector embeddings
Generated 476 automated test scenarios via multi-agent framework, reducing manual QA effort

projects.title: Cisco Switch & IP Phone Manager | Semahal
highlights: v1 (Semahal, Internal) : Python/SNMP monitoring tool for 70 Cisco switches — detects failures before user reports, -70% on-site visits
v2 (Personal) : Evolved into full-stack app with real-time web dashboard and automated Telegram alerts

projects.title: Multimodal AI Telegram Bot - Su6i-Yar
highlights: Personal AI assistant deployed on VPS — handles voice, image, finance and multilingual queries for daily use
Developed async data pipelines for live finance tracking
